specific_question: How many Elexion Automotive sales representatives have requested additional training support in 2025?
answer: According to a data report filed by Elexion Automotive's Human Resource Department, 22 of the 30 sales representatives at Elexion Automotive requested extra training support from January 2025 to October 2025.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
